name: Blue Sky Belle Fran
notes: Fire/ice physical chainer.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity and Bolting Strike families.

name: Dancing Heart Penelo
notes: Fire/ice/dark magic chainer.
Has 70% breaks, a 150% SPR buff, and 30% magic mitigation, but using any of these will eat heavily into her damage output.
Chains with the Chaos Wave Awakened family.

name: Seeker of Freedom Vaan
notes: Breaker with support and dodge provoke tanking capabilities.
Has breaks of up to 85%.
Can provide AoE mirage, and with his innate triplecast, active provoke, and high evasion, it's easy to make him into an evasion-based provoke tank who also handles breaking.

name: Healing Avatar Lid
notes: Breaker with some support capabilities.
Can provide up to 85% breaks, partial uptime on ailment/break/stop/charm immunity, and dispel buffs from enemies while leaving debuffs intact.

name: Flame of Rebirth Jake
notes: Physical fire/wind/light finisher.

name: Umbral Dragon Dark Fina
notes: Magic dark chainer.
Can also use wind or earth at a moderate damage loss.
Burns through her MP extremely quickly.
Chains with the Chaos Wave Awakened family.

name: Steadfast Soldier Machina
notes: Primarily single-target breaker that also provides some buffs.
Provides breaks of up to 80%, although he can realistically only maintain 75%.
Can AoE buff DEF/SPR by 150% and physical/magical mitigation by 30%.
Can commit suicide to fill the esper gauge and provide massive AoE LB fill.
Chains with the Bolting Strike family.

name: Benevolent Beauty Rem
notes: Fire/ice/lightning magic chainer.
Her abilities are physical attacks with magic damage, which means that she uses physical killers and can take advantage of external imbues.
Can provide 50% general mitigation and AoE reraise, but not with full uptime.
Can commit suicide to fill the esper gauge and provide massive AoE LB fill.
Passively provides some esper gauge generation each turn.
Chains with the Bolting Strike family.

name: Wild Card Ace
notes: Ice/lightning magic chainer.
His abilities are physical attacks with magic damage, which means that he uses physical killers and can take advantage of external imbues.
Can provide AoE mirage and, after several turns of setup, brief AoE reraise.
Can commit suicide to fill the esper gauge and provide massive AoE LB fill.
Passively provides some AoE MP recovery and esper gauge generation each turn.
Chains with the Chaos Wave Awakened and Bolting Strike families.

name: Sterne Leonis
notes: Time limited unit
Ice/dark physical chainer.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Kitone
notes: Time limited unit
Fire/earth physical chainer.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity and Stardust Ray families.

name: Mont Leonis
notes: Time limited unit
Physical cover tank that can dualcast provoke and cover.

name: Blue Mage Fina
notes: Healer that can also provide stat and elemental resistance buffs.

name: Irvine
notes: Physical fire/dark finisher.

name: Selphie
notes: Magic water/earth chainer.
Has some moves that are physical attacks with magic damage, avoiding one of the common mage drawbacks.
Has some utility, although much of it is stuck behind random unlocks.
Chains with the Chaos Wave Awakened family.

name: Quistis
notes: Time limited unit
Healer that can also provide 40% general mitigation and minor LB fill to the party.

name: Seifer
notes: Physical dark/earth chainer.
Can also serve as an evasion provoke tank, although this will significantly reduce his damage output.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Lone Lion Squall
notes: Physical fire/lightning chainer.

name: Rico Rodriguez
notes: Time limited unit
Physical fire chainer.
Due to the nature of his magnus ability, he will mostly only chain with a dupe.

name: Serah
notes: Magic wind/earth/light chainer.
Chains with the Chaos Wave Awakened family.

name: Lightning (FFXIII-2)
notes: Time limited unit
Magic cover and provoke tank.
Can dualcast her cover and provoke.
Is unusually hard to kill, especially on turn 1.
Can provide 50% AoE general mitigation.

name: Noel
notes: Physical water chainer.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Daughter of Destiny Vanille
notes: Breaker with some extra utility.
Can provide 80% full breaks, AoE imbue/imperil earth, and buff several elemental resistances.
Chains with the Chaos Wave Awakened family.

name: Graceful Champion Fang
notes: Physical wind/earth finisher.

name: Untamed Wolf Edel
notes: Time limited unit
Physical fire/wind chainer.
Her mitigation counters mean that in some circumstances, she can be incredibly tanky, although with a 1-turn duration and only a 60% counter chance, it's too unreliable for most fights.
Chains with the Stardust Ray family.

name: Four Winds Physalis
notes: Magic wind/water chainer.
Chains with the Chaos Wave Awakened family.

name: War Hero Raegen
notes: Physical fire/ice chainer.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Hallowed Aegis Charlotte
notes: Physical cover tank with freakishly high durability.
Can provide 50% AoE general mitigation, 25% magic/physical mitigation, stat buffs, and 2k AoE barriers.

name: Mystical Ice Lasswell
notes: Physical ice chainer (with wind as a weaker backup option).
Has some minor utility, such as an LB-consuming move that provides one turn of AoE reraise.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Cloud (FFVII: AC)
notes: Physical light/earth chainer.
Can also be used as a finisher.

name: Tifa (FFVII: AC)
notes: Physical water/lightning chainer.
Chains with the Stardust Ray family.

name: Kadaj
notes: Time limited unit
Physical wind/dark chainer.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Lezard Valeth
notes: Time limited unit
Magic fire/lightning/dark chainer.
Chains with the Chaos Wave Awakened family.

name: Mystina
notes: Time limited unit
Magic fire/dark/wind chainer.
Chains with the Chaos Wave Awakened family.

name: Y'shtola, the Sorceress
notes: Time limited unit
Magic lightning/wind chainer.
Requires an external imperil.
Chains with the Chaos Wave family.

name: Supreme Deva Akstar
notes: Physical fire/ice/dark chainer.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Dark Spirit Sol
notes: Magic fire/dark chainer.
Chains with the Chaos Wave Awakened family.

name: Draconian Princess Fina
notes: Magic light/dark chainer.
Has some minor support capabilities, including elemental resistances, Curaja, and esper gauge fill.
Chains with the Chaos Wave Awakened family.

name: Infernal Fire Rain
notes: Physical fire/earth chainer.
Chains with the Stardust Ray family.

name: Nichol of the Epsilon Star
notes: Buffer with 50% general mitigation, 30% typed mitigation, barriers, significant AoE LB fill, and more.

name: Sakura of the Delta Star
notes: Magic lightning finisher.
Suffers from severe gearing issues due to being a TDH LB mage.

name: Gilgamesh (WOTV FFBE)
notes: Physical ice chainer.
He can also be used as a magic chainer, but his damage is drastically lower if used in this way.
Has a cooldown that can completely fill a single ally's LB gauge.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Dragon Knight Freya
notes: Physical jump-based finisher.
Requires an external imperil.

name: Black Mage Vivi
notes: Magic dark finisher or fire/ice/lightning chainer.
Can buff magic mitigation by 30%.
His magic finishing move also hits the party, so dark immunity for your own team is necessary if you're planning to use it on a turn that does not immediately follow his cooldown.
Chains with the Chaos Wave Awakened family.

name: Rakish Thief Zidane
notes: Physical wind chainer.
Can provide AoE mirage.
Chains with the Stardust Ray family.

name: Strange Gourmand Quina
notes: Time limited unit
Unit that can serve as either a healer with some support capabilities, or as a dedicated barrier-spamming support.
Has an on-demand 3k AoE barrier with attached 150% DEF/SPR and 20% physical/magical mitigation buffs.
Has a cooldown that provides a 5k AoE barrier.

name: Roy Mustang
notes: Time limited unit
Magic fire finisher.
Suffers from severe gearing issues due to being a TDH LB mage.

name: King Bradley
notes: Time limited unit
Physical lightning chainer.
Can provide backup breaks for the team.
Can easily be geared to reach 100% evasion at a minimal damage loss.
Chains with the Stardust Ray family.

name: Alphonse Elric
notes: Time limited unit
Physical cover and provoke tank.
Can buff the party's mitigation by 50% and their DEF/SPR by 200%.
Provides significant AoE barriers.
Chains with the Stardust Ray family.

name: Edward Elric
notes: Time limited unit
Physical fire/water/wind/earth chainer.
Chains with the Stardust Ray family.

name: Yuna (FFX-2)
notes: Physical fire/ice/lightning/water chainer, but requires an external imperil.
Can provide 30% AoE mitigation.
Can provide AoE reraise via her LB.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Rikku (FFX-2)
notes: Breaker with access to significant utility.
Can provide on-demand AoE 75% breaks, or break by up to 80% with her cooldown or her LB.
Can provide on-demand AoE mirage.
Has cooldowns with AoE lightning imbue, AoE reraise, and AoE healing.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Paine
notes: Physical fire/ice/lightning/water chainer, but requires an external imperil.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Star Player Tidus
notes: Water physical chainer or finisher. Can also use fire/wind, at a slight damage loss.
Can AoE buff stats by 150%.
Chains with the Stardust Ray family.

name: Yunalesca
notes: Wind/dark magic chainer.
Has minor utility in the form of AoE heals, MP restoration, and ailment immunity.
Chains with the Chaos Wave Awakened family.

name: Kimahri
notes: Support unit that can provide 2 stacks of AoE mirage.
Can also provide stat buffs, healing, and breaks, but is typically bad enough at each of those that he cannot replace a dedicated unit.

name: Lilisette
notes: Water/ice physical chainer.
Can buff the party's physical mitigation by 30%.

Also has a wide variety of other utility that is gated behind single-use abilities, single use unlocks, or cooldowns. This includes, but is not limited to, a 5k barrier, AoE debuff cure, 70% AoE full break, buff-only dispel, AoE healing, and AoE LB fill.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Wizardess Shantotto
notes: Water/dark/lightning magic chainer. Can also opt for non-elemental chaining by spamming her LB, although that moderately decreases her damage output.
Can buff the party's magic mitigation by 30% and provide an AoE 1k barrier.
Chains with the Chaos Wave Awakened family.

name: Madam Edel
notes: Earth physical chainer.
Her damage starts out very low then ramps up significantly over the course of 12 turns.
Chains with the Stardust Ray family.

name: Xande
notes: Earth/dark magic chainer.
Chains with the Chaos Wave family.

name: Awakened Onion Knight
notes: Physical chainer with elemental flexibility.
Has significant burst, immunity to the major ailments, and good innate elemental resists.
Can buff the party's elemental resists.
Chains with the Stardust Ray family.

name: Hein
notes: Fire/ice/lightning magic chainer.
Can provide 50% general mitigation to the party as well as elemental resistance buffs.
Chains with the Chaos Wave Awakened family.

name: Sieghard & Ignacio
notes: Physical cover tank with some support capabilities.
Can buff mitigation by 40% and provide AoE LB fill.
Alternately, he can be used as a physical finisher, but is generally worse at this role without an external imbue.

name: Sakura & Ayaka
notes: Healer with some support capabilities.
Can provide stat buffs, barriers, ailment immunity, break immunity, AoE reraise, LB fill, and more.
Chains with the Bolting Strike family.

name: Sweet Nichol
notes: Ice/water magic chainer.
Chains with the Chaos Wave Awakened family.

name: Sweet Luka
notes: Buffer that can provide strong barriers.
Relies on a random unlock to unlock her strongest skill, but the odds aren't all that bad.
Can also provide imbues, imperils, stat buffs and unremarkable mitigation buffs.

name: Paladin Cecil
notes: Magic cover and provoke tank with a full support kit.
Can buff all stats by 180%, all elemental resists by 80%, and general mitigation by 50%.
Provides massive passive AoE LB fill via counters.
Can provide AoE HP/MP restoration, single target reraise, and emergency 65% breaks.
Can dualcast his abilities (including cover and provoke).
Has incredibly high survivability even by tank standards.
Chains with the Stardust Ray family.

name: Palom & Porom
notes: Fire magic chainer.
Can provide AoE mirage and 20% magic mitigation.
Can provide significant healing, but this requires multiple turns of setup and will fall apart if they die, making them a poor substitute for an actual healer in most cases.
Chains with the Chaos Wave Awakened family.

name: White Mage Rosa
notes: Healer with a fairly basic kit.
Can provide AoE reraise.
Can technically be used as a damage dealer, but is terrible at that role.

name: Emperor Foo
notes: Time limited unit
Combined buffer/breaker.
Is somewhat subpar at each of those invidual roles, but being able to do both at once can be very valuable in many team compositions.
Can provide breaks of up to 70%, stat buffs of up to 200%, 30% physical/magical general mitigation, AoE mirage, and significant LB fill.
Also has some other buffs that cannot be maintained the entire time, such as 40% general mitigation and various elemental resists.

name: Xuan Wu & Qing Long
notes: Time limited unit
SPR-based physical fire/wind chainer.
Has ludicrous survivability vs. magic damage, even beating out many actual magic tanks.
Has access to AoE mirage.
Chains with the Bolting Strike family.

name: Hess King Lasswell
notes: Physical fire/ice chainer.
Can provide AoE reraise on a long cooldown.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Sacred Shield Charlotte
notes: Provoke and magic cover tank with significant support skills.
Has innate dualcast, allowing her to both cover and provoke on turn 1.
Can buff general mitigation by 50%, magic mitigation by 30%, fill LB gauges, buff light/ice resistance, buff DEF/SPR, and more.

name: Warrior of Dawn Galuf
notes: Provoke and physical cover tank that can provide 50% general mitigation to the party.
Can reach 100% passive provoke without the need for limited gear.
Has 10% innate dodge (making it easier to gear for 100%) and can chain with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Awakened Warrior of Light
notes: Physical cover tank with significant support capabilities.
Can reach 100% passive provoke without the need for limited gear.
Has Curaja, elemental resistance buffs, physical mitigation, and AoE barriers.
Can provide 50% general mitigation to the party, but the cooldown on this skill is longer than the duration, so he cannot maintain 100% uptime on this.

name: Ignis
notes: Buffer with strong, flexible options at the expensive of slow, clunky setup time.
Can provide 50% AoE mitigation, massive AoE LB fill, 80% elemental resistances, stat buffs, and more.

name: Lucas
notes: Time limited unit
Magic cover and provoke tank.
Has significant utility, including AoE 50% general mitigation, magic mitigation of varying strengths, physical mitigation, mirage, imbues, and elemental resists.

Relies on his LB to buff general mitigation, but may have trouble filling it quickly enough if he's only getting by elemental attacks that he fully resists, as he relies on his counters to fill his LB gauge efficiently.
Chains with the Absolute Zero family.

name: Lunafreya
notes: Buffer who specializes in magic mitigation.
Can buff magic mitigation by up to 50%, general mitigation by 30%, stats by up to 200%, and four elemental resists by up to 100%.
Can provide significant AoE LB fill and an AoE water imbue/imperil.

name: Regis
notes: Buffer with an array of defensive options.
Can buff general mitigation by up to 50%, physical and magical mitigation by 20%, provide barriers, buff stats by up to 200%, fill LB gauges, and grant break immunity to allies.
Chains with the Stardust Ray family.

name: Warrior of Light Lenna
notes: Healer that can provide immunity to ailments, breaks, stop, and charm.
Can buff mitigation by 30%.
Has AoE reraise on her LB.
Fills the LB gauge a bit while healing, and can massively fill ally LB gauged by emptying her own.

name: White Knight Noel
notes: Time limited unit
Provoke and magic cover tank.
Can reach 100% passive provoke without the need for limited gear.
Can AoE buff mitigation by 50%.
Chains with the Tornado, Freeze, Absolute Zero, and Chaos Wave Awakened families.

name: A.I. Katy
notes: Time limited unit
Physical/magical cover tank who can also provide 70% breaks.
Typically must use her cover each turn to reapply the barrier, or she's at a higher risk of dying.
Alternately, she can be built for damage and used as a chainer, although this is a much less potent option.

name: Folka
notes: Healer with a varied support kit.
Has Curaja and Reraise.
Can buff every type of mitigation (albeit on separate cooldown abilities that lack 100% uptime), provide immunity to breaks/ailments/stop/charm, and restore MP to the party.

name: Kryla
notes: Time limited unit
Breaker with breaks of up to 75% for every stat, including a turn 1 70% full break.
Can also imperil various elements, buff elemental resistances, fill ally LB gauges, and dispel + rebreak on the same turn.
Chains with the Absolute Zero, Bolting Strike, and Chaos Wave families.

name: Levinson
notes: Time limited unit
Ice/fire hybrid chainer.
Can provide breaks and significant elemental resistance buffs starting on T2.
Chains with the Bolting Strike and Aureole Ray families.

name: Maritime Strategist Nichol
notes: Buffer with access to significant general mitigation buffs.
Can buff all stats, regenerate HP/MP for the party, provide mitigation, buff elemental resistances, and cure breaks.
Can also help to fill the LB and esper gauges.

name: Myra
notes: Healer that can also provide buffs.
Can bring stat buffs, partial ailment immunity, break immunity, and charm immunity.
Has a version of Entrust that works with W-Ability.

name: Sieghard
notes: Physical cover and provoke tank.
He can cover magic, but isn't particularly great at doing so, as his magic cover ability has a cooldown and his stats are more aimed at surviving physical damage.
His LB provides a 45% general mitigation buff to the party for three turns.

name: Summer Fina & Lid
notes: Breaker with significant utility.

In addition to providing breaks, has strong AoE healing, AoE reraise, AoE MP recovery, can grant a physical water Aureole Ray chaining move to allies and herself, can imbue allies with water (although this may also charm them), buff water resistance, imperil several elements, buff LB fill rate, and fill the LB gauge.

name: Sylvie
notes: Breaker/buffer combination.
At only 65%, her breaks are subpar compared to dedicated breakers, but she can provide stat buffs, typed mitigation, barriers, imbues, and more.

name: Adventurer Locke
notes: Breaker with breaks of up to 84%.
Can provide AoE mirage.
Chains with the Stardust Ray family.

name: Aerith
notes: Healer with some utility.
Can provide break immunity, AoE reraise, 30% general mitigation, and help to fill LBs.

name: Doctor Aiden
notes: Healer with plenty of utility.
Healing from his abilities is low, which can make it hard to actually make the most of said utility without external support, especially if the tank is taking lots of damage.

name: Erik
notes: Time limited unit
Earth physical chainer.
Chains with the Bolting Strike family.

name: Neverending Hope
notes: Buffer who can grant a wide variety of elemental resistances, along with the more standard stat and general mitigation buffs.
Can buff magic mitigation.
Can provide significant ST LB fill.
Also has some subpar breaks that could be useful in rare situations.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Olberic
notes: Physical cover and provoke tank.
His LB provides a 40% general mitigation buff to the party for three turns.
Chains with the Aureole Ray family.

name: Sylvando
notes: Time limited unit
Buffer with some unusual abilities.
Can buff stats, elemental resistances, and physical mitigation.
Can provide mirage, 2k AoE barriers, AoE LB fill, and some backup healing.

name: White Lily Dark Fina
notes: Earth/dark/fire magic chainer.
Can buff those same elemental resistances by 80%.
Chains with the Chaos Wave Awakened family.

name: Yuraisha
notes: Can provide buffs to all stats, as well all three types of mitigation (although her general mitigation is on the low side).
Has AoE barriers, elemental resistance buffs, and AoE HP/MP regen.

name: Agent Olive
notes: Dark/fire physical chainer.
Can also serve as a finisher, but can only burst once per fight. Alternately, this skill can be used to burst as a chainer if you can provide her with external chains to cap.
Chains with the Bolting Strike family.

name: Aldore King Rain
notes: Fire physical chainer. Can also use lightning or earth at a minor damage loss.
Can provide AoE barriers.
Technically chains with the Stardust Ray family, but works very poorly with it in practice as most of his damage comes from his LB.

name: Ardyn
notes: Dark/fire physical chainer.
Can provide breaks that ramp up to 74%, although they're weak on turn 1 and will eat significantly into his damage if he tried to maintain them.
Chains with the Stardust Ray family.

name: Auron
notes: Breaker who can also provide support chaining.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Aurora Fryevia
notes: Light hybrid chainer.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity, Divine Ruination, and Aureole Ray families.

name: Awakened Rain
notes: Magic cover and provoke tank.
Can grant ailment/stop immunity to allies.
Has AoE heals/MP restoration, at the cost of LB gauge.

name: Dark Knight Leon
notes: Dark physical chainer.
Bursts very hard.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Jasper Unbound
notes: Time limited unit
Lightning/dark physical chainer.
Chains with the Stardust Ray family.

name: Kurasame
notes: Hybrid ice chainer.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Lilith
notes: Time limited unit
Magic cover tank with some utility.
Can buff the party's general mitigation by 35% and magic mitigation by 30%.
Can also cover physical, although her stats are not well-suited for it.
Chains with the Divine Ruination, Bolting Strike, and Aureole Ray families.

name: Lotus Mage Fina
notes: Healer with Curaja and Reraise.
Can also apply AoE reraise.
With her latent abilities, she can provide good buffs and elemental resistances via W-Ability, although the low healing on the turns that she refreshes these effects might be a problem.

name: Machina
notes: Breaker and physical chainer.
Damage drops significantly while maintaining breaks, so you typically have to choose which to focus on.
Can buff physical and magical mitigation by 20%.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Mercenary Ramza
notes: Versatile tank. Able to provoke and cover physical or magical damage.
His magic cover has a cooldown, which may be a problem if you're planning to rely on reraise, or if the boss dispels him.
Is immune to all ailments and charm, is 50% resistant to Stop, and has 30% innate resistance to all ailments.
Has Entrust.

name: Operative Zyrus
notes: Ice/lightning/dark magic chainer.
Can burst hard once per battle via his Magnus skill.
Chains with the Absolute Zero, Bolting Strike, and Chaos Wave Awakened families.

name: Physalis
notes: Ice physical chainer.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Rab
notes: Time limited unit
Wind/lightning/dark hybrid chainer.
Can provide significant backup healing.
Chains with the Bolting Strike family.

name: Radiant Lightning
notes: Lightning physical chainer.
Can serve as a breaker in a pinch, although her damage would suffer greatly and she would struggle with bosses that get dispelled.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Seaside Nichol
notes: Support unit focusing exclusively on defensive buffs.
Can provide significant DEF/SPR buffs, all three types of mitigation, and some minor barriers.
Unfortunately, his physical/magical mitigation buffs cannot be dualcast, which means he cannot provide much in the way of HP/MP restoration while maintaining those.
Can cure imperils and berserk (as well as breaks, charm, and stop).

name: Serena
notes: Time limited unit
Healer with good utility.
Can buff magic mitigation by 30%, provide AoE reraise, grant ST ailment/charm/stop/break immunity (with AoE on a cooldown), restore MP, and briefly buff general mitigation by 40%.

name: Warrior of Light Bartz
notes: Wind physical chainer.
Requires several turns of setup time before dealing any damage.
Has Entrust, and his LB automatically fills at the beginning of each stage, allowing him to instantly fill any other unit's LB at the start of a fight if desired.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Assassin Shadow
notes: Dark/wind physical chainer.
Can provide AoE mirage.
Chains with the Stardust Ray family.

name: Basch
notes: Physical and magical cover tank.
Has some support capabilities in the form of breaks and buffs.

name: Beowulf
notes: Fairly standard breaker.
Will struggle with fights that require AoE breaks.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Beryl
notes: Magic tank with some support capabilities.
Can provide breaks, but because you typically need both breaks and cover on turn 1, he may not be able to replace a dedicated breaker in many team compositions.
Chains with the Bolting Strike, Chaos Wave, Octaslash, and Disorder families.

name: Chow
notes: Time limited unit
Unusual combination of healer and magic cover tank.
Can provide stat buffs and 30% general mitigation.
His LB provides 1 turn of 54% general mitigation and also refills the team's MP.
His rotation can be somewhat awkward to work with, and he lacks much of the standard healer utility, so replacing your healer with him has drawbacks.

name: Demon Rain
notes: Time limited unit
Physical cover and provoke tank.
Has high survivability, but not much utility.

name: Elena
notes: Hybrid chainer with elemental flexibility and buffing capabilities.
Can provide stat buffs, barriers, and mitigation to the party.
Chains with the Stardust Ray and Bolting Strike families.

name: Eleven
notes: Time limited unit
Fire/lightning physical chainer.
Chains with the Bolting Strike family.

name: Godrea
notes: Water/dark/ice physical chainer.
Requires several turns of setup to deal optimal damage.
Can restore the party's HP and MP by using items in an AoE.
Chains primarily with the Divine Ruination, but can also chain with the Bolting Strike, Absolute Mirror of Equity, Absolute Zero, and Chaos Wave families at a moderate damage loss.

name: Heavenly Technician Lid
notes: Her T1 AoE breaks aren't quite as strong as those of some other units, but she can later on upgrade them to 79% once her LB is ready.

name: Hyoh
notes: Fire/lightning physical chainer.
Chains with the Divine Ruination and Absolute Mirror of Equity families.

name: Karten
notes: Dark physical chainer with high burst.
Chains with the Bolting Strike family, aside from his burst, which chains with the Aureole Ray family (singlecast only).

name: Loren
notes: Competent breaker that can also chain.
Chains with the Onion Slice and Aureole Ray families.

name: Lucius
notes: Time limited unit
Dark/fire physical chainer.
Chains with the Divine Ruination family.

name: Mastermind Xon
notes: Physical chainer with significant utility.
Can maintain 70% breaks on a single enemy by alternating his cooldown breaks with another Mastermind Xon.
Can provide AoE mirage.
Can copy buffs from allies or enemies, then share them with the party.
Chains with the Bolting Strike, Stardust Ray, Absolute Zero, Absolute Mirror of Equity, and Aureole Ray families.

name: Riku
notes: Time limited unit
Dark physical chainer.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Rivera
notes: Unusual support unit able to turn any ally into a provoke tank or AoE physical cover tank, although whoever she picks will be significantly less durable than a normal tank.
Can provide AoE Mirage, restore MP, and heal.

name: Sephiroth (KH)
notes: Time limited unit
Dark/light physical chainer.
Chains with the Divine Ruination family.

name: Shadow Lord
notes: Dark physical chainer.
Has ludicrous survivability thanks to his upgraded Immortal Justice passive.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: The Lord of Shadows
notes: Time limited unit
Dark physical chainer.
Has an 80% ATK/MAG break, but it renders the boss immune to damage for two turns, making it more of an emergency tool than anything else.
Chains with the Stardust Ray family.

name: Wilhelm
notes: Provoke and physical cover tank.

name: Yuna
notes: Healer with some support capabilities.
Has some utility in the form of various elemental resistance buffs, esper gauge fill, and a DEF/SPR buff.

name: Zargabaath
notes: Buffer with significant general mitigation buffs.
Can temporarily provide break immunity.
Can reraise allies and provide massive HP/MP restoration to single targets.
Can chain with the Octaslash family.

name: Zeno of the Beta Star
notes: Fire physical chainer.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: 2B
notes: Time limited unit
Physical chainer that also provides breaks.
Only works well in that combined role when paired with a copy of herself, as the lion's share of her damage comes from her LB.

name: Aloha Lasswell
notes: Water/wind physical chainer with high innate evasion.
Reaches 80% dodge with just two copies of his own TM, making it very easy to gear him for 100%.
Has a provoke skill.
He has a physical AoE cover ability with a cooldown. If you pair him with another copy, you can alternate the cooldowns and maintain 100% uptime.
Burns through MP very, very quickly.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Ayaka
notes: Fairly standard healer.
Can slightly fill ally LB gauges and provide barriers.

name: Chocobo Fina
notes: Physical chainer who scales off of SPR.
Requires an external imperil.
Her high SPR makes her very durable against magic damage.
Has some healer-ish utility, such as reraise.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Christine
notes: Time limited unit
Ice magic chainer.
Chains with the Chaos Wave Awakened family.

name: Cid
notes: Physical finisher.
Requires several turns of setup, and relies heavily on external imperils in order to deal good damage, but can burst very hard in the right circumstances.

name: Circe
notes: Magic chainer with plenty of elemental flexibility.
Chains with the Absolute Zero, Chaos Wave, and Bolting Strike families.

name: Fryevia
notes: Ice hybrid chainer.
Chains with the Bolting Strike family.

name: Holy Night Amelia & Emilia
notes: Time limited unit
Physical chainer with subpar breaks.
Chains with the Stardust Ray family.

name: Jade
notes: Time limited unit
Fire/ice/lightning physical chainer.
Requires an external imperil.
Chains with the Bolting Strike family.

name: Kimono Fina
notes: Ice/light magic chainer.
Chains with the Chaos Wave family.
Can provide some minor support capabilities, most notably LB fill via her own LB.

name: King Edgar of Figaro
notes: Will struggle with fights that demand AoE breaks on the first turn.
Can imperil several elements and chain with the Stardust Ray family.

name: Magitek Warrior Terra
notes: Fire/wind/light magic chainer.
Chains with the Chaos Wave Awakened family.

name: Monk Sabin of Kolts
notes: Fire/water physical chainer.
Requires external imperils.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Mordegon
notes: Time limited unit
Ice/dark magic chainer.
Requires extensive ramp up time to reach peak damage, and suffers greatly if he dies.

Can provide breaks, but must be paired with another copy of himself so that they can stagger their break cooldowns to maintain 100%. And this won't work well against bosses that must be dispelled frequently.
Chains with the Absolute Zero family.

name: Primrose
notes: Buffer with a fairly standard kit.
Can buff mitigation by up to 40% (but drops down to 30% on some turns due to cooldowns), provides stat buffs, imbues allies with dark, and can fill the LB gauge.
Chains with the Chaos Wave family.

name: Pyro Glacial Lasswell
notes: Fire/ice physical chainer.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.
His damage relies heavily on unlocking his latent abilities.

name: Rena
notes: Time limited unit
Combined healer and buffer.
Can provide 35% magic mitigation (50% on a cooldown), AoE reraise, break/ailment/stop/charm immunity, 30% general mitigation, an undispellable 200% DEF/SPR buff, and an AoE light imbue/120% imperil.

name: Sora
notes: Time limited unit
Physical chainer.
Has no imperils of his own.
Chains with the Divine Ruination and Absolute Mirror of Equity families.

name: Tsukiko
notes: Magic chainer with several elements to choose from.
Can provide 75% breaks, although 100% uptime requires a dupe to stagger cooldowns with and a somewhat wonky rotation.
Can effortlessly maintain 65% breaks as part of her normal damage rotation.
Chains with the Chaos Wave, Absolute Zero, and Bolting Strike families.

name: Veronica
notes: Time limited unit
Nonelemental magic chainer.
Requires extensive ramp up time to reach peak damage, and suffers greatly if she dies.
Chains with the Absolute Zero family.

name: Warrior of Light Krile
notes: Light/wind magic chainer.
Chains with the Stardust Ray family.

name: Wild Rose Firion
notes: Physical chainer with some elemental flexibility.
Chains with the Stardust Ray family.

name: Akstar
notes: Fire/ice physical chainer.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Archmage Kefka
notes: Ice/lightning/dark magic chainer.
Chains with the Chaos Wave Awakened family.

name: Bart
notes: Time limited unit
Bizarre mix of dodge-based provoke tank and support.
Can provide 60% AoE breaks, AoE mirage, AoE LB fill rate, single target imbues, single target LB fill, and some minor AoE MP sustain.
Chains with the Kingsglaive, Tornado, and Flood families.

name: Cloud (KH)
notes: Time limited unit
Physical chainer.
Has no imperils of his own.
Chains with the Divine Ruination family.

name: Crown Prince Noctis
notes: Physical finisher.
Requires an external imperil.

name: Dark Mage Exdeath
notes: Wind/earth/dark magic chainer.
Chains with the Chaos Wave family.

name: Dressy Aileen
notes: Earth physical chainer with some utility.
Can also use light, although she has no imperil for that element.
Can fill ally LB gauges.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Eiko
notes: Healer who can fill the evoke gauge.
Can cure all debuffs, including berserk, charm, stop, imperils, and breaks.

name: Flammie
notes: Time limited unit
Subpar buffer.

As a buffer, he has some uncommon and useful utility, but is also missing some standard buffer abilities, such as 100% uptime on general mitigation and AoE MP regen, which may force you to rely on other units to cover the gaps in his kit.
Can chain with the Aureole Ray family.

name: Gentiana
notes: Ice magic chainer.
Chains with the Chaos Wave family.

name: Gladiolus
notes: Physical cover tank.
His other skills are, unfortunately, mostly irrelevant.

name: Lovely Katy
notes: Time limited unit
Healer that can also provide AoE reraise.
Has a fairly bare-bones kit by healer standards.

name: Malphasie
notes: Wind/dark hybrid chainer.
Can chain with the Bolting Strike, Aureole Ray, and Tornado families.
With her cooldown skill, she can AoE fill the LB gauge and break enemy DEF/SPR by 74%.

name: Prompto
notes: Breaker with chaining capabilities.
Chains with the Octaslash family.
Has a 65% AoE ATK/MAG break and a 70% DEF break.

name: Raegen
notes: Fire and ice physical chainer.
Imbues himself with both elements as part of his rotation, so his damage suffers noticeably if the enemy is immune to either one.
Can buff most elemental resistances.
Chains with the Divine Ruination and Absolute Mirror of Equity families.

name: Reberta
notes: Fire/ice/lightning physical chainer.
Chains with the Bolting Strike family.

name: Red XIII
notes: Physical chainer with elemental flexibility.
Can provide AoE mirage.
Chains with the Stardust Ray family.

name: Rem
notes: Unusual combination of healer and chainer.
Can dualcast Curaja and Tornado, allowing her to serve as a support chainer.
Unlike most 7* healers, does not have the ability to heal and reraise on the same turn.

name: Sol
notes: Light/dark magic chainer.
Chains with the Chaos Wave family.

name: Yuffie
notes: Physical chainer with elemental flexibility.
Can provide AoE mirage.
Chains with the Stardust Ray family.

name: Blossom Sage Sakura
notes: Lightning magic chainer.
Has some decent support capabilities, including AoE mitigation and ailment immunity buffs.

name: Elephim
notes: Support unit with both breaks and buffs.
Provides 75% breaks and 200% buffs.
Can also provide some significant AoE healing and an AoE light imbue.

name: Ellesperis
notes: Dark physical chainer.
Chains with the Bolting Strike family.

name: Esther
notes: Lightning physical chainer.
Chains with the Bolting Strike, and Aureole Ray (singlecast only) families.

name: Grim Lord Sakura
notes: Time limited unit
Fire/dark magic chainer with support capabilities.
Chains with the Chaos Wave family.
Can buff DEF/SPR, provide 35% AoE mitigation, reraise allies, grant break/partial ailment immunity, apply barriers, restore MP, and slightly fill the LB gauge.

name: Kimono Ayaka
notes: Physical chainer whose damage scales off of SPR.
Requires an external imperil.
Can provide some AoE healing/MP regen.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Nalu
notes: Physical lightning chainer.
Chains with the Bolting Strike family.

name: Roy
notes: Support unit with strong buffs and breaks on T1. However, as soon as they expire, he becomes significantly worse because he can't refresh them with the same potency.
Works best when paired with another breaker who cannot break well on T1.

name: Beatrix
notes: Physical light chainer.
Can provide adequate breaks after turn 1, albeit at a massive damage loss.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Citan
notes: Time limited unit
Physical water/wind chainer.
Requires an external imperil.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Elfreeda
notes: Terrible provoke tank.

name: Ignacio
notes: Fire physical finisher who can also imbue other units with fire.
Has some minor buffing capabilities, but the stat buffs cost LB crystals, meaning that they are typically unusable on the first turn.

name: Immortal Knight Garland
notes: Dark physical chainer.
Can buff several elemental resists by 70%. Also has a 70% AoE full break, albeit on a very long cooldown.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Mediena
notes: Magic ice chainer.
Can buff the party's stats and restore MP.
Chains with the Absolute Zero and Freeze families.

name: Nameless Gunner Jake
notes: Physical finisher with elemental flexibility.
Requires several turns of setup.

name: Randi
notes: Time limited unit
Decent physical chainer with some elemental flexibility.
Chains with the Aureole Ray (singlecast only), Absolute Mirror of Equity, Bolting Strike, and Absolute Zero families.
Pairs decently with Esther due to being able to match her rotation, although his damage is far, far lower than hers.

name: Regina
notes: Physical finisher.
Suffers from very, very low survivability, and keeping her alive will be a struggle on many fights.

name: Viktor Marchenko
notes: Time limited unit
Provoke tank with subpar survivability.
Chains with the Aureole Ray family.
Can become immune to charm, stop, breaks, and ailments.
Can heal himself and restore his own MP.

name: Zack
notes: Physical finisher.
Relies on an external imbue to maximize his damage output.

name: Jecht
notes: Physical water chainer.
Chains with the Divine Ruination family.

name: Kaito
notes: Physical solo damage dealer.
Very unusual in that his damage comes almost entirely from damage over time effects, meaning that he doesn't work as a finisher (and his damage as a chainer is not worth mentioning).
Can provide AoE mirage.
Will struggle (and typically fail) at trials that impose time limits.

name: Knight Delita
notes: Physical chainer or finisher with a 74% ATK/MAG/DEF break attached to his LB.

name: Maria (Xenogears)
notes: Time limited unit
Magic chainer that can choose between fire and non-elemental damage.
Has significant ramp-up time with non-elemental damage.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family (with her fire move only).

name: Ramza
notes: Mediocre support unit with breaks and buffs, although he has trouble providing both at once in a clean rotation.
Can dualcast 60% breaks for all four stats.
Can sing for buffs/regen, but you will have gaps in the song buff uptime if you try to have him also maintain breaks.
Consider giving Cradle of Horns to him or another party member to cover those gaps.

name: Squall
notes: Physical chainer with elemental flexibility.
Can also function as a finisher, although his hits are spread out and may not fit well into many chains.

Technically chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family, but his chaining moves are very weak and the bulk of his damage comes from capping his own chains with Keen Edge, which would break the chain when done with anyone but another Squall.

name: Summer Folka & Citra
notes: Water/light evoke chainer with significant utility.

Can grant ailment/break/charm/stop resistance to allies, buff water/light resistance, buff stats, AoE recover LB, buff LB fillrate, provide healing and mitigation (on a cooldown), and imbue allies with light (which may charm them).
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family, and can grant a physical water Aureole Ray attack to themselves or allies.

name: Yego
notes: Earth physical chainer.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Ace
notes: Subpar buffer.
Unfortunately, his buffs are semi-random.

name: Atoning Dragoon Kain
notes: Physical chainer with elemental flexibility. Can also serve as a finisher (which requires several turns of setup).
Chains with the Graviton Cannon family.

name: Emperor
notes: Fire magic finisher.
Requires some ramp up time to hit peak damage.

name: Fei
notes: Time limited unit
Dark physical chainer.
Can also chain with wind, which is noticeably weaker, or with several other elements, which are drastically weaker but could be useful in certain situations.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family (only with his dark move).

name: High Seraph Ultima
notes: Non-elemental magic chainer with solid utility.
Chains with the Chaos Wave family.
Can simultaneously dispel enemy buffs and ally debuffs, while leaving enemy debuffs and ally buffs intact.
Burns through MP extremely quickly.

name: Karlette
notes: Hybrid chainer with elemental flexiblity and support capabilities.
Can buff elemental resistances and mitigation.
Can AoE break ATK/MAG by 70%, but this ability is on a cooldown.
Chains with the Quick Hit, Absolute Mirror of Equity, and Aureole Ray families.

name: Lila
notes: Terrible physical chainer.
She also has SPR-scaling moves, but they are much weaker.
She can switch between fire and lightning damage.
Chains with the Graviton Cannon and Stardust Ray families.

name: Livid Shantotto
notes: Primarily fire/water magic chainer.
Can also use other elements.
Has horrifically low health, which impedes her usability on harder trials.
Chains with the Chaos Wave family.

name: Qin
notes: Time limited unit
Combined buffer/breaker.
Is somewhat subpar at each of those invidual roles, but being able to do both at once can be very valuable in many team compositions.
Can provide breaks of up to 65%, stat buffs of up to 200%, 40% general mitigation (50% on a cooldown), and 70% to all elmenetal resists.

name: Seabreeze Dark Fina
notes: Magic chainer.
She is locked into using two elements at once, has ramp up time, and will suffer greatly if she dies or if the boss gets dispelled.
Her damage is absolutely terrible unless you unlock her latent abilities.

name: Balthier
notes: Physical finisher with elemental flexibility.
His damage output is heavily affected by randomness, and may break some chains.

name: Black Mage Golbez
notes: Terrible dark/light magic chainer.
Burns through MP very quickly.
Has a lot of built-in elemental resistances.
Chains with the Chaos Wave family.

name: Dark Fina
notes: Magic chainer.
She is locked into using three elements at once, has ramp up time, and will suffer greatly if she dies or if the boss gets dispelled.
Her damage is absolutely terrible unless you unlock her latent abilities.

name: Elly
notes: Time limited unit
Fire/water/wind/earth magic chainer.
Can also be used as a finisher via her LB, which is a physical attack and can therefore be affected by imbues or elemental weapons.
Chains with the Chaos Wave Awakened family.

name: Fayt
notes: Time limited unit
Physical chainer with elemental flexibility.
Requires quite a few turns of ramp-up to reach his maximum damage potential.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Marie
notes: Terrible support unit that focuses on buffing elemental resistances.
Can also provide AoE mitigation or barriers via cooldown.

name: Morgana
notes: Magic ice chainer.
Chains with the Absolute Zero family.

name: Nagi
notes: Light/dark hybrid chainer.
Chains with the Divine Ruination family.

name: Rinoa
notes: Non-elemental magic finisher.
Can slightly fill ally LB gauges with Aura.

name: Sephiroth
notes: Light and dark physical chainer.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.
His damage requires several turns to ramp up.

name: Sophia
notes: Time limited unit
Magical chainer with elemental flexibility.
Chains with the Chaos Wave and Quake families.

name: A2
notes: Time limited unit
Physical chainer who relies on external imperils.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity family.

name: Crimson
notes: Fire physical chainer.
Chains with the Divine Ruination family.

name: Lulu
notes: Water magic chainer.

name: Tiana
notes: Time limited unit
Earth magic chainer.
Can help to sustain the party's HP/MP via her limit burst.

name: Tifa
notes: Water physical chainer.
Requires several turns of ramp up.
Chains with the Divine Ruination family.

name: Yun
notes: Time limited unit
Fire physical chainer.
Chains with the Absolute Mirror of Equity and Bolting Strike families.

name: Ang
notes: Time limited unit
Fire physical finisher.
While his maximum burst can only be done once every five turns, he can use smaller bursts in between.

name: Aranea
notes: Physical finisher.
Has no utility and requires several turns of setup for one turn of burst damage.

name: Bai Hu & Zhu Que
notes: Time limited unit
Fire/lightning physical chainer with fairly high survivability vs. incoming magic damage.
Chains with the Divine Ruination family.
Has an alternate SPR-heavy build, but this option deals much less damage.

name: Cloud
notes: Physical finisher.
Can also chain with the Meteor Rain family, but the damage is pretty bad.

name: Dracu Lasswell
notes: Time limited unit
Terrible ice physical chainer.
Chains with the Divine Ruination and Absolute Mirror of Equity families.

name: Duke
notes: Ice physical finisher.
Requires several turns of setup.

name: Emperor Shera
notes: Very weak fire physical chainer.
Can imbue himself and another unit with fire, but this lacks 100% uptime and his terrible damage makes him a poor chaining partner.
Chains with the Divine Ruination family.

name: Felix
notes: Time limited unit
Terrible fire/earth hybrid chainer.

Has no real chaining partners-- technically, several of his moves do belong to the Aureole Ray and Octaslash families, but those moves are very weak and he wants to cap his chains with the much stronger Salute - Blade Rush, something that only another Felix can do.
Requires several turns to really get going.

name: Veritas of the Flame
notes: Physical fire finisher.

name: Citra
notes: Terrible magical light chainer with some minor support capabilities.
She can chain with the Divine Ruination family.
Can buff the party's magic mitigation by 35%, refill MP, fill the esper gauge, and heal the party a bit.

name: Kunshira
notes: Hybrid chainer with great elemental flexibility.
Can buff various elemental resistances, while also buffing DEF/SPR at the same time. With two of her, you can maintain this buff 100% of the time.
Chains with the Aureole Ray family.

name: Noctis
notes: Bizarre physical chainer who requires setup and has several turns of downtime.
Damage output is high while Armiger Wakes, then plummets to almost nothing for several turns while waiting for the unlock to cool down again.

name: Nyx
notes: Physical fire chainer with terrible damage and utility.
Can AoE fill the team's LB by sacrificing his life.
Chains with the Kingsglaive family.

name: Olive
notes: Lightning finisher.
Her primary finishing moves have significant casting times, meaning that most chains will be unable to fit both hits when she dualcasts them.

name: Queen
notes: Lightning physical chainer.
Has very high survivability thanks to the 200% DEF/SPR buffs from Berserk+2.
Provides MP regen for the party.
Chains with the Quick Hit family.

name: Aileen
notes: Terrible earth physical chainer.
Can provide AoE LB fill.
Chains with the Stardust Ray family.

name: Arngrim
notes: Time limited unit
Physical fire finisher.

name: Dark Knight Luneth
notes: Dark physical finisher with extreme suicidal tendencies.
His high HP costs coupled with triple cast means that it is nearly impossible to keep alive.

name: Lenneth
notes: Time limited unit
Dark physical chainer.
Very difficult to chain due to her walking frames.

name: Luneth
notes: Terrible physical finisher.

name: Marquis de Léon
notes: Time limited unit
Terrible provoke tank with a few very weak chaining skills.
Has a 60% break on a 5 turn cooldown, which can allow him to weaken nasty threshold attacks, but he cannot serve as a primary breaker.

name: Onion Knight Refia
notes: Physical damage dealer with elemental flexibility.
Chains with the Onion Slice family, but not very well, due to requiring unlocks.

name: Barbariccia
notes: Terrible magical wind chainer.
Can cap her chains with Raging Wind for massive damage after several turns of ramp-up, or instead cap with Aeroja for AoE damage.
Chains with the Tornado family.

name: Dark Knight Cecil
notes: Terrible dark physical finisher.
Has lots of human killer passives, but even with those, his damage is not competitive.

name: Dragonlord
notes: Time limited unit
Terrible fire magical finisher.

name: Fohlen
notes: Terrible physical finisher.
His burst is decent but requires several turns of setup.

name: Jiraiya
notes: Subpar hybrid chainer with some elemental flexibility.
Requires setup before he can use any of his best moves, and even then his damage isn't amazing.
After setup, he can chain with the Divine Ruination, Kingsglaive, and Octaslash families.
Can provide decent AoE elemental resists with attached mirage.

name: Onion Knight
notes: Terrible physical damage dealer with elemental flexibility.
Can break enemy DEF by 74%, and buff several elemental resistances by 70%.
Chains with the Onion Slice family.

name: Orlandeau
notes: Light physical chainer.
Chains with the Divine Ruination family.

name: Pure Summoner Rydia
notes: Weak summoner.
Requires setup before bursting for very low amounts of damage.
Has niche applications against bosses with high mitigation, as evoke damage will ignore said mitigation.

name: Trance Terra
notes: Fire/dark magic chainer.
Requires an external imperil.
Very high MP consumption.
Chains with the Chaos Wave family.

name: Veritas of the Dark
notes: Dark physical chainer.
Has a bit of utility in the form of AoE mitigation, a 74% ATK break on his LB, and AoE dark resistance.
Chains with the Divine Ruination family.

name: Adam Jensen
notes: Time limited unit
Fire physical chainer with access to 2-stack AoE mirage.
Chains with the Stardust Ray family.

name: Delita
notes: Terrible dark physical chainer.

name: Estark
notes: Time limited unit
Terrible dark physical chainer.
Can chain with the Divine Ruination family.

name: Freya (VP)
notes: Time limited unit
Terrible magic chainer.

name: Immortal Flame Katy
notes: Time limited unit
Terrible magical chainer.
Chains with the Chaos Wave, Quake, Tornado, Flood, and Freeze families, although her damage is by far the best with Chaos Wave.

name: Lightning
notes: Terrible lightning physical chainer.
Chains with the Quick Hit family.
Buffs her own stats by 150%, which can allow you to forego a buffer.

name: Lunera
notes: Terrible magic chainer with some buffing capabilities.
Chains with the Aureole Ray family.

name: Prishe
notes: Terrible physical chainer.
Locked behind setup turns and has no chaining partners.
Can provide AoE reraise.

name: Tidus
notes: Impossibly bad water physical chainer.
Technically chains with the Quick Hit family, but his rotation is a mess. Constant switching between single cast, dual cast, and triple cast means he has no real partners.

name: Veritas of the Light
notes: Light hybrid AoE chainer or finisher.
Can cure all debuffs from a single ally, including berserk, charm, stop, imperils, and breaks.

name: Vincent
notes: Subpar physical chainer with no partners.
Has a single target 55% full break.

name: Gilgamesh
notes: Terrible physical chainer.
Chains with the Divine Ruination family.

name: Popstar Katy
notes: Time limited unit
Absolutely terrible magical chainer/finisher.
Far worse than most 6* units.
Do not use.
